creator: cpm@freebsd.org
text:
I checked the telegram GH repository and a lot of pull requests are pending. The latest stable release is 1.3.1 that we already have it into the ports tree.

It's worth to ask to the telegram developer if he has some planning or roadmap to add telegram 1.4.1 as a new stable tag.

https://github.com/vysheng/tg/releases
